methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $11M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Biotech & Health (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 16 same-sector peers exist in Biotech & Health, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 7.4x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

data.narrative:
Trilobio, a seed-stage biotech company founded by Roya Amini-Naieni and Maximilian Schommer, has raised $11M to date. The broader Biotech & Health sector includes 3 public comparables (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private peers, though narrow peer-group filtering yields insufficient datapoints for direct median benchmarking.

Stage-progression analysis, the only fully applicable method here, uses the $11M total raised as a valuation proxy and applies a 2.5x step-up multiplier typical of seed-to-next-stage advancement in this sector. This yields an implied valuation of $28M. Peer-median comparison is inapplicable: while 16 same-sector peers exist, fewer than three match Trilobio's specific stage or valuation tier, making sector-wide median anchoring misleading. Public-comp P/S anchoring cannot be applied because private companies rarely disclose revenue; the three public biotech comparables trade at a 7.4x median P/S, but without Trilobio's revenue figure this multiple is not actionable.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $23M–$32M, centered at $28M. This range reflects a ±15% sensitivity band around the stage-progression result. Key uncertainties include the absence of disclosed revenue or comparable-stage transaction multiples specific to Trilobio's therapeutic focus, and reliance on a single methodological input. A Series A financing or revenue milestone would substantially narrow this range.
